table.t-attf-style: padding:0px 20px 10px 20px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff;

tr.t-attf-style: color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'}; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};

padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};

table.style: border-bottom:0px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; border-top:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

tr.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};

table.t-attf-style: font-size:12px;padding:0px 20px 20px 20px; margin:0; font-family: Arial,Helvetica, sans-serif; background:#fff; line-height:20px; border-top:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'};

td.t-attf-style: border-bottom:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; padding:0px;

table.style: border:0.5px solid #ccc; border-collapse: collapse; text-transform:capitalize; padding:15px;border-bottom:1px solid #ccc;

tr.t-attf-style: padding:5px 10px; border:1px solid #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; font-weight:bold; background-color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_color or '#000000'}; color: #{o.company_id and o.company_id.theme_text_color or '#000000'};
